ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
Language: java
OpenAPI Generator allows generation of API client libraries (SDK generation), server stubs, documentation and configuration automatically given an OpenAPI Spec (v2, v3)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Snailclimb/JavaGuide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Snailclimb/JavaGuide
Language: java
Java 面试 & 后端通用面试指南，覆盖计算机基础、数据库、分布式、高并发与系统设计。准备后端技术面试，首选 JavaGuide！

ns0:entry.ns0:title: StarRocks/starrocks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/StarRocks/starrocks
Language: java
The world's fastest open query engine for sub-second analytics both on and off the data lakehouse. With the flexibility to support nearly any scenario, StarRocks provides best-in-class performance for multi-dimensional analytics, real-time analytics, and ad-hoc queries. A Linux Foundation project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
Language: java
【AI低代码平台】AI low-code platform empowers enterprises to quickly develop low-code solutions and build AI applications. 助力企业快速实现低代码开发和构建AI应用！ AI应用平台涵盖：AI应用、AI模型、AI聊天助手、知识库、AI流程编排、MCP和插件，聊天式业务操作等。 强大代码生成器：实现前后端一键生成，无需手写代码! 显著提升效率节省成本，又不失灵活~

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kestra-io/kestra
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kestra-io/kestra

Event Driven Orchestration & Scheduling Platform for Mission Critical Applications

Language: java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: krahets/hello-algo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/krahets/hello-algo
Language: java
《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langchain4j/langchain4j
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langchain4j/langchain4j
Language: java
LangChain4j is an open-source Java library that simplifies the integration of LLMs into Java applications through a unified API, providing access to popular LLMs and vector databases. It makes implementing RAG, tool calling (including support for MCP), and agents easy. LangChain4j integrates seamlessly with various enterprise Java frameworks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: quarkusio/quarkus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/quarkusio/quarkus
